title: Dragon-tease — boss tease eye blinks behind enemy castle in intro
hypothesis: A red dragon eye blinking behind the enemy castle plus a pulsing BEWARE! subtitle creates a Zeigarnik pattern-interrupt that boosts retention@5s.
diff_from_baseline: New playable/dragon_tease.js draws a red blinking dragon eye + radial halo at top-right of canvas during intro phase
Adds pulsing 'BEWARE!' subtitle (Arial Black bold italic, red #B0000F with black stroke, easeOutBack pop at 900ms)
Hook layer fades in at 200-600ms and fades out at 3900-4500ms; only active while game.phase === 'intro'
review_notes: Axis respected (intro hook). Thumbnail shows red dragon eye top-right + 'BEWARE!' overlay during intro. Bundle 2.96 MB, well under 5 MB. Combat loop tokens preserved, no regression markers.
